message:
🐛 Fix cluster showing Offline immediately on refresh click (#853)

When clicking refresh on a cluster that was previously in an error state
(reachable: false, errorType: 'timeout'), those stale fields persisted
through the refresh, causing the UI to show the cluster as Offline while
the new health check was in flight.

Fix: Clear reachable/errorType/errorMessage when starting a manual
refresh so the cluster shows as "loading" with cached data instead of
"offline". Also skip clusters being manually refreshed in the progressive
health checker to prevent race conditions.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
